column5: for "ikā, f." part, could consider creating a separate H2B entry for dvārikā.

column7: Typo – Please note that this is a Likely Typographical Error: You may find the citation provided by Vaidya for this definition—Yāj. iii.223 (Yājñavalkya Smṛti, Chapter 3, Verse 223)—interesting. If you consult that specific verse, kākola is actually listed as the proper name of a hell (Naraka), not a hill. LB Note: It is highly probable that Vaidya (or the printer) made a typographical error here, conflating "hell" with "hill." Other comprehensive dictionaries of the era, such as Monier-Williams, correctly cite Yāj. iii.223 for the definition of a "hell".
